items.title: RSVP for Engramme 'Memory singularity' event on Apr 27
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Apr 23: Invite-only event to experience Large Memory Models live at Engramme's new office (785 Market St, SF). RSVP link provided — event is tomorrow.

items.title: Check with Martin from Array on Optery conflict and circle back to Lawrence
items.context: Email from Derek on Apr 22: 'We're also checking with Martin from Array on conflict and will circle back shortly.' Commitment made in follow-up to lawrence@optery.com.

items.title: Offer fund intros to Lawrence at Optery once conflict is cleared
items.context: Email from Derek on Apr 22: Listed 7 cyber funds (1011, Paladin, Titanium, SYN, Ballistic, Forgepoint, Evolution Equity) and offered intros. Waiting for Lawrence to indicate which are helpful.

items.title: Review Opti sales deck and Gong demo recordings from Barak
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Apr 23: Shared sales deck, Gong recording of CPO demo with WM's CISO, and 5-min pitch + demo for AWS teams. Richie had requested customer-facing materials.

items.title: Send Sentra intro to Amex AI investments team
items.context: Email thread Apr 20-21: Fan committed to connecting Ashwin Gopinath with 'my friend who leads AI investments and partnerships at Amex, and she is very interested.' Ashwin replied: 'Love to get connected to the Amex Team.'

items.title: Follow up with Matt Polak for update on VanishID round process and dynamics
items.context: Email from Logan on Apr 25 asking Matt for round process/dynamics update. Matt had asked Logan to confirm he was all set with the team — Elizabeth already had her product session.

items.title: Review flowstate DD Q&A responses and schedule partner follow-up
items.context: Email from oliver@flowstate.inc on Apr 19 (forwarded by Jake Apr 20): Detailed inline Q&A responses on team, traction, business model, financing, and competitive moat. Some items flagged for live discussion.
